sourceRecords.title: Harbor North security review extends outbound inspections
sourceRecords.normalizedText: Harbor North reported enhanced outbound container screening through the morning shift because of a short-term security review.

sourceRecords.title: Members report cargo delays at Harbor North terminal
sourceRecords.normalizedText: Association members reported three to five hour outbound processing delays at Harbor North while inspections remained elevated.

sourceRecords.title: East Grid confirms outage at substation 7
sourceRecords.normalizedText: East Grid reported a storm-related outage at substation 7 and said restoration crews were on site.

sourceRecords.title: Storm cell crosses East Grid industrial corridor
sourceRecords.normalizedText: A severe storm cell crossed the East Grid industrial corridor shortly before the substation 7 outage notice.

events.headline: Inspection surge reported at Harbor North cargo terminal
events.summary: Two curated sources point to increased cargo inspections at Harbor North after a security directive, with measurable shipment delays.

events.headline: Storm-related outage affects East Grid substation 7
events.summary: A utility bulletin and weather operations feed both indicate a temporary outage at East Grid substation 7.

claims.claimText: Outbound cargo inspections increased after a security directive.
Container processing delays reached three to five hours.
Substation 7 experienced a temporary outage during a storm passage.
Restoration crews were already on site when the outage bulletin was published.

confidenceAssessments.label: high
confidenceAssessments.rationale: Two curated logistics feeds independently reported the same operational change.

confidenceAssessments.label: medium
confidenceAssessments.rationale: The utility bulletin is direct, but the causal storm link is still inferred from adjacent reporting.
